name: College Dorm Hierarchy
description:
You made it to college, congrats! You’ve been placed in an all girls dorm on campus. You were looking forward to the freedom of college, but it turns out there’s a strict hierarchy in your dorm, with a bitchy girl called Steffy at the top.

Bonus pic: Tags: lesbian, lesdom, dominant, wlw, pet, slave, mistress, owner
creator: TLeafs
